'''ngasuju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cnidopsin|cnidopsin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-s-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cnidopsin|cnidopsin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngasuju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæsijith|ngæsijith]] || [[word:ngæsijij|ngæsijij]] || [[word:ngæsijish|ngæsijish]] || [[word:ngæsiji|ngæsiji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngasusujuth|ngasusujuth]] || [[word:ngasusujuj|ngasusujuj]] || [[word:ngasusujush|ngasusujush]] || [[word:ngasusuju|ngasusuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngasujuth|ngasujuth]] || [[word:ngasujuj|ngasujuj]] || [[word:ngasujush|ngasujush]] || [[word:ngasuju|ngasuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngasufjuth|ngasufjuth]] || [[word:ngasufjuj|ngasufjuj]] || [[word:ngasufjush|ngasufjush]] || [[word:ngasufjuf|ngasufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngasujuthu|ngasujuthu]] || [[word:ngasujuju|ngasujuju]] || [[word:ngasujushu|ngasujushu]] || [[word:ngasujuku|ngasujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngasujuth|ngasujuth]] || [[word:ngasujuj|ngasujuj]] || [[word:ngasujush|ngasujush]] || [[word:ngasuju|ngasuju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngasujuthul|ngasujuthul]] || [[word:ngasujujul|ngasujujul]] || [[word:ngasujushul|ngasujushul]] || [[word:ngasujukul|ngasujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngasujuthuthu|ngasujuthuthu]] || [[word:ngasujujuju|ngasujujuju]] || [[word:ngasujushushu|ngasujushushu]] || [[word:ngasujuku|ngasujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngasujuthun|ngasujuthun]] || [[word:ngasujujun|ngasujujun]] || [[word:ngasujushun|ngasujushun]] || [[word:ngasujukun|ngasujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngasujuthuoro|ngasujuthuoro]] || [[word:ngasujujuoro|ngasujujuoro]] || [[word:ngasujushuoro|ngasujushuoro]] || [[word:ngasujukuoro|ngasujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
